HRA Calculator

Estimate annual HRA exemption using monthly salary, HRA received, rent paid and city type. Built for quick Indian salary planning.

No Signup
Browser-based
Free to use
Privacy-first
Files stay on your device. Not uploaded anywhere.

HRA exemption estimator

Uses the common old-tax-regime HRA formula for quick planning.

Estimated exemption

Rs 1,56,000

Taxable HRA

Rs 84,000

Annual rent

Rs 2,16,000

Actual HRA receivedRs 2,40,000
50% of salaryRs 3,00,000
Rent paid minus 10% of salaryRs 1,56,000

This is an estimate for informational use. HRA rules can depend on your tax regime, salary structure, employer policy and rent proofs. Consult a tax professional for filing decisions.

Advertisement

Ad space reserved for future

Advertisement space

Ad space reserved for future

HRA exemption estimate for India

House Rent Allowance can reduce taxable salary for eligible salaried taxpayers under the old tax regime. The exempt amount is usually the least of actual HRA received, a percentage of salary, and rent paid minus 10% of salary.

Documents often needed

  • Rent receipts for the relevant months
  • Rental agreement if your employer asks for it
  • Landlord PAN when rent crosses applicable limits
  • Salary breakup showing basic salary, DA and HRA

Use this as a planning estimate only. Tax rules and employer requirements can change.

Practical guidance for HRA Calculator

Estimate House Rent Allowance exemption using salary, HRA received, rent paid and metro or non-metro city rules. Business tools are useful for freelancers, tenants, landlords, and small businesses that need a simple printable record. JaldiDocs is designed for everyday Indian document workflows where a small mismatch in size, format, page order, or file weight can cause an upload to fail.

Before you use the tool

  • Keep the original file unchanged so you can restart if a form has a different requirement.
  • Check whether the portal asks for pixels, millimetres, page size, file format, or maximum KB/MB.
  • Use a clear file name without special symbols before uploading to government, exam, tax, or business portals.

After downloading

  • Review names, dates, amounts, and tax fields before downloading.
  • Keep a copy for your own records after generating the document.
  • Use the generated document as a convenience template, not as legal or tax advice.
  • Open the final file once on your device and confirm it is readable before submitting it anywhere.

Privacy and accuracy note

The tool runs in your browser wherever possible, which means your file is processed on your own device instead of being uploaded to JaldiDocs. Official requirements can still change, so always compare the output with the latest instructions from the website or organization where you plan to submit it.
